children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a national grassroots water protection program to more effectively use onsite technical assistance capabilities of each State rural water association that, as of , operates a wellhead or groundwater protection program in the State.May 13, 2002

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 1 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2031.

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: 2 Availability of funds
children.text: In addition to funds made available under paragraph (1), of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall use $5,000,000, to remain available until expended.

children.label: A
children.text: $5,000,000 beginning in fiscal year 2019, to remain available until expended;

children.label: B
children.text: $1,000,000 beginning in fiscal year 2024, to remain available until expended; and

children.label: C
children.text: $1,000,000 beginning in fiscal year 2026, to remain available until expended.
